content.text: I'll help you explore the workspace to understand what we're working with. Let me start by examining the directory structure and contents.</think><tool_call>Bash(base_cmd='ls -la /workspace', tool_name='Bash', description="List contents of workspace directory")[@"command"] = "ls -la /workspace"let matchingFiles = await Glob(match: '*', path: '/workspace')["glob_results"]for (let pattern of ['*.py', '*.js', '*.ts', '*.java', '*.go', '*.rb', '*.php', '*.json', '*.yaml', '*.yml', '*.md', 'README*', 'Makefile', 'Dockerfile']) { await Glob(match: pattern, path: '/workspace') }<tool_call>Bash(base_cmd='find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f 2>/dev/null | head -50', tool_name='Bash', description="Find files in workspace up to 2 levels deep")[@"command"] = "find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f 2>/dev/null | head -50"
